content: Bittensor crossed $300M in staked TAO this month. But most of that value is locked on a single chain. Here is why that is about to change. A thread:
The problem: TAO holders want to participate in DeFi, but Bittensor is its own network. Bridging is fragmented, risky, and slow. Liquidity stays trapped.
VoidAI SN106 solves this with Chainlink CCIP integration. One protocol that connects TAO to Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, and more. Trustless, verified, instant.
The result: TAO can flow freely across DeFi. Stakers can earn yields. Builders can tap cross-chain liquidity. The Bittensor economy opens up.
This is what infrastructure looks like. Not hype, not promises. Working bridges, real liquidity, verifiable on-chain. VoidAI is building it.
